summary.note: 文档整体与源码高度一致，Token 语义、端点路径、SSE 事件结构均经源码验证正确。发现 2 个 P1（端点计数偏差、step.ended 同步版本号描述歧义）和 3 个 P2（行号微偏、参数表示差异）级别问题。

checks.description: Context 使用率 usedContext = input + cacheRead（不含 cacheWrite）
checks.source_evidence: packages/opencode/src/acp/usage.ts:207: `used: message.tokens.input + message.tokens.cache.read`
checks.note: 文档引用行号准确，公式完全匹配

checks.description: Message.tokens 用 = 覆盖（非累加），Message.cost 用 += 累加
checks.doc_claim: §23 L4384-4385: processor.ts:717 tokens = 覆盖; processor.ts:716 cost += 累加
checks.source_evidence: packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:716: `ctx.assistantMessage.cost += usage.cost`; L717: `ctx.assistantMessage.tokens = usage.tokens`

checks.description: Session.tokens 通过 SQL UPDATE 累加（projector.ts:96-107）
checks.doc_claim: §23 L4403-4416: projector.ts:96-107 SQL 累加，含 sign=1/-1
checks.source_evidence: packages/core/src/session/projector.ts:90-110: applyUsage 函数，L94 sign=1 默认值，L99-104 SQL `${col} + ${value * sign}` 累加
checks.note: 文档 SQL 语句与源码完全匹配（cost, tokens_input/output/reasoning/cache_read/cache_write 6 个字段）

checks.description: input 不包含 cacheRead/cacheWrite，各字段独立非重叠
checks.source_evidence: packages/opencode/src/acp/usage.ts:89: `inputTokens: message.tokens.input`（直接取值，不减去 cache）；usage.ts:91: totalTokens = input + output + reasoning + cacheRead + cacheWrite（若 input 已含 cache 则 total 会重复计算）
checks.note: totalTokens 的计算公式（L91）证实各字段独立不重叠，与文档描述一致

checks.description: Session 级无 total 字段
checks.doc_claim: §23 L4366: Session 级无 total 字段
checks.source_evidence: packages/core/src/session/schema.ts:32-40: SessionV2.Info.tokens = Schema.Struct({ input, output, reasoning, cache: { read, write } }) — 确实无 total 字段
checks.note: 源码 Session schema 与文档描述完全一致

checks.description: Session 端点计数：文档称 20 个，实际文档列出 23 个
checks.source_evidence: 文档 L4605-4627 实际列出 23 行端点（含 /session/import、/session/{id}/message、/session/{id}/prompt_async、/session/{id}/init 等超出的条目）
checks.note: 文档标题写 20 个，但实际表体列出了 23 个端点。计数与内容不一致。源码 SessionPaths 定义了 27 条路由。

checks.description: POST /session/import 端点在文档中存在，但源码 SessionPaths 中未定义
checks.doc_claim: §端点总览 L4608: POST /session/import — 导入分享会话
checks.source_evidence: packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:78-105: SessionPaths 对象中无 import 路径；public.ts 中也未发现 import 路由
checks.note: 文档记录了 POST /session/import 端点，但源码中未找到对应的路由定义。可能是已被移除的端点或文档过度记录。

checks.description: Session.tokens schema: { input, output, reasoning, cache: { read, write } }
checks.source_evidence: packages/core/src/session/schema.ts:32-40: SessionV2.Info.tokens = Schema.Struct({ input: Finite, output: Finite, reasoning: Finite, cache: { read: Finite, write: Finite } })
checks.note: 字段名和嵌套结构完全匹配

checks.description: Session schema 关键字段: id, parentID, projectID, agent, model, cost, tokens, time, title, location, subpath
checks.source_evidence: packages/core/src/session/schema.ts:25-49: Info class 含 id(L26), parentID(L27), projectID(L28), agent(L29), model(L30), cost(L31), tokens(L32-40), time(L41-45), title(L46), location(L47), subpath(L48)
checks.note: 所有字段名、类型（含 optional 修饰）与源码完全匹配

checks.description: session.next.step.ended payload: { timestamp, sessionID, assistantMessageID, finish, cost, tokens, snapshot? }
checks.doc_claim: §21.7.4 L3294: { timestamp, sessionID, assistantMessageID, finish: string, cost: number, tokens: Tokens, snapshot?: string }
checks.source_evidence: packages/core/src/session/event.ts:190-209: Step.Ended schema = { ...Base(timestamp,sessionID), assistantMessageID, finish(String), cost(Finite), tokens({input,output,reasoning,cache:{read,write}}), snapshot(optional) }
checks.note: payload 结构完全匹配，tokens 内嵌结构与文档一致

checks.description: session.next.step.ended 同步版本 v2
checks.source_evidence: packages/core/src/session/event.ts:36-41: stepSettlementOptions = { sync: { aggregate: 'sessionID', version: 2 } }; L192: Step.Ended 使用 ...stepSettlementOptions
checks.note: version: 2 与 stepSettlementOptions 引用均正确

checks.description: session.next.step.failed payload: { timestamp, sessionID, assistantMessageID, error: { type: 'unknown', message: string } }
checks.doc_claim: §21.7.4 L3310: { timestamp, sessionID, assistantMessageID, error: { type: 'unknown', message: string } }
checks.source_evidence: packages/core/src/session/event.ts:212-220: Step.Failed schema = { ...Base, assistantMessageID, error: UnknownError }; L43-48: UnknownError = { type: Literal('unknown'), message: String }

checks.description: processor.ts 中 step.ended 发布时的 payload 字段完整性
checks.doc_claim: 文档描述 step.ended 包含 timestamp, sessionID, assistantMessageID, finish, cost, tokens, snapshot
checks.source_evidence: packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:703-711: events.publish(Step.Ended, { sessionID, assistantMessageID, finish: value.reason, cost: usage.cost, tokens: usage.tokens, snapshot: completedSnapshot, timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()) })
checks.note: 发布时的实际 payload 与 schema 定义和文档描述三方一致

checks.description: projector.ts 行号引用范围微偏
checks.source_evidence: packages/core/src/session/projector.ts:90-110: applyUsage 函数实际范围 L90-L110，SQL set 子句在 L98-106，where 子句在 L107
checks.note: 文档引用 96-107 是 SQL 语句主体，但函数签名从 L90 开始。不影响正确性，仅是范围表述不精确。

checks.description: Provider 路径参数表示差异
checks.source_evidence: packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/provider.ts:58: `${root}/:providerID/oauth/authorize`
checks.note: 文档用 {id}，源码用 :providerID。语义等价，但参数名不一致可能误导开发者。建议文档改为 {providerID}。

checks.description: Permission 端点 POST /session/{id}/permissions/{pid} 标注为已废弃
checks.doc_claim: §端点总览 L4644: POST /session/{id}/permissions/{pid} — 已废弃
checks.source_evidence: packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:101: `permissions: \`${root}/:sessionID/permissions/:permissionID\``; L395: HttpApiEndpoint.post("permissionRespond", SessionPaths.permissions)
checks.note: 源码中路由仍存在但文档标注已废弃，状态信息准确。不过源码中无 @deprecated 注解，无法从源码本身判断废弃状态。
